nodes.label: Library build mode
nodes.rationale: Vite switches to library mode when BUILD=library, uses src/index.ts as the public entry, and externalizes vue, pinia, and vue-router.

nodes.label: AI integration via kanban.json
nodes.rationale: The README frames direct AI edits to kanban.json as a supported workflow that should be reflected live in the board.

nodes.label: Local-first Kanban architecture
nodes.rationale: MyKanban is both a standalone app backed by kanban.json and an embeddable npm library.

nodes.label: Optimistic REST plus WebSocket sync
nodes.rationale: Mutations are applied optimistically in useBoardStore, sent over REST, and reconciled through WebSocket broadcasts, while external file edits are rebroadcast as board-updated.

nodes.label: @ path alias
nodes.rationale: The application tsconfig maps @/* to src/* for cleaner internal imports.

nodes.label: Split TypeScript project references
nodes.rationale: The root tsconfig delegates checking to separate node-side and app-side TypeScript projects.

nodes.label: Node-side tooling tsconfig
nodes.rationale: The node tsconfig covers Vite and related tooling files with bundler module resolution and noEmit.
